subcodes.first_line: He, exalted be His glory, saith: They have ruled for the slaying of those who have turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon. He arose to accomplish My martyrdom, and when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قوله جل جلاله افتی علی قتل الذین اقبلوا الی الافق الاعلی قام علی قتلی فلما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @high station of the true believer, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
